document.name: Queens Public Library — Central Library Children's Programs
document.shortDescription: QPL's flagship Jamaica campus hosts rotating free children's programs—storytimes, early learning, and family events (see queenslibrary.org/calendar).
document.longDescription:
Queens Public Library's Central Library at 89-11 Merrick Boulevard in Jamaica is the system hub for borough-wide children's programming. The official site publishes a full events calendar with storytimes, early-learning activities, cultural programs, and family events at Central Library and across Queens. Branch contact phone listed on Queens Library materials: 718-990-0700.

Program names, ages, and times change seasonally; filter the calendar by Central Library on queenslibrary.org/calendar before visiting. Many programs are free with a Queens Public Library card.

Sources: https://www.queenslibrary.org/about-us/locations/Central-Library https://www.queenslibrary.org/calendar
document.announcementDescription: Filter queenslibrary.org/calendar by Central Library for current children's programs.
